title: merciera tenuifolia var. azurea
intro: Merciera tenuifolia var. azurea, also known as Azure Needle Flower, is a plant species native to Hawaii, belonging to the family Asteliaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, thanks to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The Azure Needle Flower can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular remedy among herbalists and traditional healers.
